productDisplayName: Timex Men Black Dial Watch T2N520
description: Article number: T2N520Case style: Analogue watch with a circular case and stainless steel back, has a fixed bezel with markingsDial style: Black dial, has silver-toned markings with glow-in-the-dark inlays, silver-toned hour and minutes hands with glow-in-the-dark inlays, yellow seconds hand, branding below the 12 hour markFeatures: Three-faced chronograph displays, screw to reset the timeStrap style: Black textured leather strap secured with a fold-over clasp, has two loops to hold the tail in placeWater-resistant up to 100 mComes in a signature Timex caseWarranty: 1 year from the date of purchase, against manufacturing defects only
